sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67788" key="mikrofrosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρο-φροσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67788.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">littleness of mind</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σοφιστικὴ μ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.351a</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
